description: Restoration, wellness, and protection from harm. Mending what is broken and shielding what remains.
powers: Restorative
Each use mends what is broken. Wounds close, pain fades, and the body remembers what it felt like before the damage.
Venom Purge
Poison recoils from this item's touch. It draws the toxin out like pulling a thorn, leaving clean blood behind.
Plague Ward
Disease cannot take root in the wielder's body. Sickness circles but never lands, turned away by something unseen.
Healing Amplifier
Restoration magic hits harder. What would mend a scratch now mends a gash. The item multiplies every kindness the body receives.
Quick Stitch
Wounds seal themselves shut as if stitched by invisible hands. Fast, clean, and without a scar.
Heart Mender
Grief and despair loosen their grip. The item cannot erase sorrow, but it lifts the weight enough to breathe again.
Courage Song
A soothing melody drifts from the item. Fear withers in its presence, and allies stand a little taller.
Breath Adaptor
Lungs adapt to anything. Toxic fumes, liquid, thin mountain air. The wielder breathes easy where others would choke.
Altitude Lungs
The air at any height feels rich and full. Mountain peaks and high passes hold no threat to the wielder's breath.
Gill Gift
Water becomes as breathable as air. The wielder descends into the deep without worry, lungs pulling life from the current.
Void Breath
Even in the absence of air, the wielder breathes. The vacuum holds no terror for one who carries this item.
Clean Air
Toxins in the surrounding air simply vanish. The item filters what is harmful, leaving only what sustains.
Death's Leash
The item will not let the wielder die easily. It pulls them back from the edge, though the cost is fragility.
Insect Veil
A barrier of subtle force surrounds the wielder. Biting, stinging things bounce away as if striking glass.
Breath Pocket
A bubble of fresh air forms underwater around the wielder. A sanctuary beneath the waves, calm and breathable.
Guardian Shadow
A dark shape follows the wielder, hovering at the periphery. It offers no words, only silent protection.
